steps.title: Identify the relationship between c and m
steps.content:
Connor has 4 times as many dollars as Maria.
Therefore, $c = 4m$.
Since Connor's total money can be expressed in terms of Maria's, we proceed to express the total amount together.

steps.title: Express the total amount
steps.content:
Together they have a total of \$25.00.
So, $c + m = 25$.
This combined with $c = 4m$ gives us the system.

steps.title: Determine the correct system of equations
steps.content:
• The given relationships are $ c = 4m$ and $c + m = 25$.
This corresponds exactly to choice A.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
